name: cloudflare-expense-tracker
description: Expense Tracker application with Cloudflare ecosystem

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../worker && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:worker && npm run build:frontend
scripts.deploy:frontend: cd frontend && npx wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:frontend
scripts.d1:migrate: npm run d1:migrate:local && npm run d1:migrate:remote
scripts.type-check: cd frontend && npm run type-check && cd ../worker && npm run type-check
scripts.clean: rm -rf frontend/dist frontend/node_modules worker/dist worker/node_modules node_modules
